definition: The most generic type of item.
The most generic kind of creative work, including books, movies, photographs, software programs, etc.
definition_ko: 책·영화·사진·소프트웨어 등을 포함하는 가장 일반적인 창작물 타입.

definition: A body of structured information describing some topic(s) of interest.
equivalent_terms: dcat:Dataset, dctype:Dataset, void:Dataset, prov:Entity (loose), cr extends sc:Dataset
notes: equivalentClass declared with dcat:Dataset, dctype:Dataset, void:Dataset

definition: A collection of datasets.
All or part of a [[Dataset]] in downloadable form.
definition_ko: 다운로드 가능한 형태의 데이터셋 전부 또는 일부.

definition: A single feed providing structured information about one or more entities or topics.
definition_ko: 하나 이상의 개체·주제에 대한 구조화된 정보를 제공하는 단일 피드.

definition: A single item within a larger data feed.

A media object, such as an image, video, audio, or text object embedded in a web page or a downloadable dataset i.e. DataDownload. Note that a creative work may have many media objects associated with it on the same web page. For example, a page about a single song (MusicRecording) may have a music video (VideoObject), and a high and low bandwidth audio stream (2 AudioObject's).
definition_ko: 웹 페이지 또는 다운로드 가능 데이터셋(DataDownload)에 포함된 이미지·비디오·오디오·텍스트 등 미디어 객체.

definition: A person (alive, dead, undead, or fictional).
An organization such as a school, NGO, corporation, club, etc.
Entities that have a somewhat fixed, physical extension.
The mailing address.
A contact point—for example, a Customer Complaints department.
notes: equivalentClass with vcard:VCard. Original spec uses HTML entity — (em-dash)

definition: A property-value pair, e.g. representing a feature of a product or place. Use the 'name' property for the name of the property. If there is an additional human-readable version of the value, put that into the 'description' property. Always use specific schema.org properties when a) they exist and b) you can populate them. Using PropertyValue as a substitute will typically not trigger the same effect as using the original, specific property.
definition_ko: 속성-값 쌍. 제품·장소의 특성 표현. name으로 속성명, description으로 사람이 읽기 쉬운 값.
notes: [TRUNCATED→BOOSTED] Original JSON-LD rdfs:comment includes \\n\\n line breaks (converted to spaces in definition column). Full text preserved verbatim. Used for variable measurement in datasets via cr:variableMeasured

definition: A word, name, acronym, phrase, etc. with a formal definition. Often used in the context of category or subject classification, glossaries or dictionaries, product or creative work types, etc. Use the name property for the term being defined, use termCode if the term has an alpha-numeric code allocated, use description to provide the definition of the term. Use the about property to specify what the term is about.
definition_ko: 공식 정의를 가진 단어·이름·약어·구. 분류·용어집·사전 맥락에서 사용.
notes: [BORDERLINE] schema:isPartOf <https://pending.schema.org>; pending area but explicitly requested by user

definition: A set of defined terms, for example a set of categories or a classification scheme, a glossary, dictionary or enumeration. Use the about property to specify what the term set is about.
notes: [BORDERLINE] schema:isPartOf <https://pending.schema.org>; pending area but explicitly requested by user

definition: The name of the item.
A description of the item.
The identifier property represents any kind of identifier for any kind of Thing.
definition_ko: 모든 종류의 Thing에 대한 모든 종류의 식별자.

definition: URL of the item.
URL of a reference Web page that unambiguously indicates the item's identity. E.g. the URL of the item's Wikipedia page, Wikidata entry, or official website.
definition_ko: 항목의 정체를 모호하지 않게 가리키는 참조 웹 페이지 URL (Wikipedia·Wikidata·공식 사이트 등).

definition: An alias for the item.
An additional type for the item, typically used for adding more specific types from external vocabularies in microdata syntax.
definition_ko: 항목의 추가 타입 (외부 어휘의 더 구체적인 타입을 추가할 때 사용).

definition: A sub property of description. A short description of the item used to disambiguate from other, similar items. Information from other properties (in particular, name) may be necessary for the description to be useful for disambiguation.
definition_ko: 유사 항목과 구별하기 위한 짧은 설명. description의 sub property.

definition: An image of the item.
Indicates a page (or other CreativeWork) for which this thing is the main entity being described. See [background notes](/docs/datamodel.html#mainEntityBackground) for details.
definition_ko: 이 항목을 주된 개체로 기술하는 페이지·CreativeWork.

definition: A CreativeWork or Event about this Thing.
definition_ko: 이 Thing에 관한 CreativeWork 또는 Event.

definition: The subject matter of the content.
An abstract is a short description that summarizes a [[CreativeWork]].

The author of this content or rating. Please note that author is special in that HTML 5 provides a special mechanism for indicating authorship via the rel tag. That is equivalent to this and may be used interchangeably.
A citation or reference to another creative work, such as another publication, web page, scholarly article, etc.
definition_ko: 다른 창작물·간행물·웹 페이지·학술 논문 등에 대한 인용 또는 참조.

definition: Conditions that affect the availability of, or method(s) of access to, an item. Typically used for real world items such as an [[ArchiveComponent]] held by an [[ArchiveOrganization]]. This property is not suitable for use as a general Web access control mechanism. It is expressed only in natural language.
definition_ko: 항목의 가용성·접근 방식에 영향을 주는 조건. 자연어로만 표현.

definition: The location depicted or described in the content. For example the location in a photograph or painting.
definition_ko: 콘텐츠 내에서 묘사·기술된 위치 (예: 사진·그림 속 위치).

definition: A secondary contributor to the CreativeWork or Event.
The party holding the legal copyright to the CreativeWork.
Text of a notice appropriate for describing the copyright aspects of this Creative Work, ideally indicating the owner of the copyright for the Work.
definition_ko: CreativeWork의 저작권 측면을 기술하는 데 적합한 고지문 텍스트.

definition: The year during which the claimed copyright for the CreativeWork was first asserted.
The country of origin of something, including products as well as creative works such as movie and TV content.
The creator/author of this CreativeWork. This is the same as the Author property for CreativeWork.
Text that can be used to credit person(s) and/or organization(s) associated with a published Creative Work.
definition_ko: 발행된 CreativeWork에 관여한 사람·조직을 명시하는 데 사용할 수 있는 텍스트.

definition: The date on which the CreativeWork was created or the item was added to a DataFeed.
The date on which the CreativeWork was most recently modified or when the item's entry was modified within a DataFeed.
Date of first publication or broadcast. For example the date a [[CreativeWork]] was broadcast or a [[Certification]] was issued.
A media object that encodes this CreativeWork. This property is a synonym for associatedMedia.

Media type typically expressed using a MIME format (see [IANA site](http://www.iana.org/assignments/media-types/media-types.xhtml) and [MDN reference]) e.g. application/zip for a SoftwareApplication binary audio/mpeg for .mp3 etc.
A person or organization that supports (sponsors) something through some kind of financial contribution.
A [[Grant]] that directly or indirectly provide funding or sponsorship for this item. See also [[ownershipFundingInfo]].
definition_ko: 이 항목에 직간접적으로 자금·후원을 제공하는 Grant.

definition: Indicates an item or CreativeWork that is part of this item, or CreativeWork (in some sense).
The language of the content or performance or used in an action. Please use one of the language codes from the [IETF BCP 47 standard]. See also [[availableLanguage]].
definition_ko: 콘텐츠·공연의 언어 또는 행위에 사용된 언어.

definition: A resource from which this work is derived or from which it is a modification or adaptation.
definition_ko: 이 작품이 파생·수정·각색의 출처가 된 자원.

definition: Indicates an item or CreativeWork that this item, or CreativeWork (in some sense), is part of.
definition_ko: 이 항목·CreativeWork이 부분이 되는 상위 항목.

definition: Keywords or tags used to describe some item. Multiple textual entries in a keywords list are typically delimited by commas or by repeating the property.
A license document that applies to this content, typically indicated by URL.
The location where the CreativeWork was created, which may not be the same as the location depicted in the CreativeWork.
definition_ko: CreativeWork이 생성된 위치 (콘텐츠가 묘사하는 위치와 다를 수 있음).

definition: A maintainer of a [[Dataset]], software package ([[SoftwareApplication]]), or other [[Project]]. A maintainer is a [[Person]] or [[Organization]] that manages contributions to, and/or publication of, some (typically complex) artifact.
The person or organization who produced the work (e.g. music album movie TV/radio series etc.).

The service provider, service operator, or service performer; the goods producer. Another party (a seller) may offer those services or goods on behalf of the provider. A provider may also serve as the seller. Supersedes carrier.
The publisher of the creative work.
Indicates the date on which the current structured data was generated / published. Typically used alongside [[sdPublisher]].
notes: Refers to metadata generation date, not data itself

definition: A license document that applies to this structured data, typically indicated by URL.
notes: License of metadata, not of data

definition: Indicates the party responsible for generating and publishing the current structured data markup, typically in cases where the structured data is derived automatically from existing published content but published on a different site.
definition_ko: 현재 구조화된 데이터 마크업의 생성·발행 책임자.
notes: Publisher of metadata, not of data

definition: The Organization on whose behalf the creator was working.
The "spatial" property can be used in cases when more specific properties (e.g. [[locationCreated]], [[spatialCoverage]], [[contentLocation]]) are not known to be appropriate.
definition_ko: 더 구체적 속성이 적절치 않은 경우 사용하는 일반 공간 속성.

definition: The spatialCoverage of a CreativeWork indicates the place(s) which are the focus of the content. It is a subproperty of contentLocation intended primarily for more technical and detailed materials. For example with a Dataset, it indicates areas that the dataset describes: a dataset of New York weather would have spatialCoverage which was the place: the state of New York.
definition_ko: CreativeWork이 다루는 공간 범위. Dataset의 경우 데이터셋이 기술하는 지역.

definition: The "temporal" property can be used in cases where more specific properties (e.g. [[temporalCoverage]], [[dateCreated]], [[dateModified]], [[datePublished]]) are not known to be appropriate.
definition_ko: 더 구체적 속성이 적절치 않은 경우 사용하는 일반 시간 속성.

definition: The temporalCoverage of a CreativeWork indicates the period that the content applies to, i.e. that it describes, either as a DateTime or as a textual string indicating a time period in [ISO 8601 time interval format].

The schema.org [[usageInfo]] property indicates further information about a [[CreativeWork]]. This property is applicable both to works that are freely available and to those that require payment or other transactions.
definition_ko: CreativeWork에 대한 추가 정보 (이용 안내 등).

definition: The version of the CreativeWork embodied by a specified resource.

A downloadable form of this dataset, at a specific location, in a specific format. This property can be repeated if different variations are available. There is no expectation that different downloadable distributions must contain exactly equivalent information (see also [DCAT](https://www.w3.org/TR/vocab-dcat-3/#Class:Distribution) on this point). Different distributions might include or exclude different subsets of the entire dataset, for example.
definition_ko: 특정 위치·포맷의 데이터셋 다운로드 가능 형태. Croissant은 FileObject·FileSet 값으로 의미를 변경함.

definition: A data catalog which contains this dataset.

The International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) that identifies this serial publication. You can repeat this property to identify different formats of or the linking ISSN (ISSN-L) for this serial publication.
A subproperty of [[measurementTechnique]] that can be used for specifying specific methods, in particular via [[MeasurementMethodEnum]].
definition_ko: 특정 측정 방법을 명시하는 measurementTechnique의 하위 속성.

definition: A technique, method, or technology used in an [[Observation]], [[StatisticalVariable]] or [[Dataset]] (or [[DataDownload]], [[DataCatalog]]), corresponding to the method used for measuring the corresponding variable(s).

The variableMeasured property can indicate (repeated as necessary) the variables that are measured in some dataset, either described as text or as pairs of identifier and description using PropertyValue, or more explicitly as a [[StatisticalVariable]].
A dataset contained in this catalog.
An item within a data feed. Data feeds may have many elements.
An entity represented by an entry in a list or data feed (e.g. an 'artist' in a list of 'artists').
The datetime the item was removed from the DataFeed.
Actual bytes of the media object, for example the image file or video file.
definition_ko: 미디어 객체의 실제 바이트 (예: 이미지·비디오 파일).

definition: File size in (mega/kilo)bytes.
The [SHA-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/SHA-2) SHA256 hash of the content of the item. For example, a zero-length input has value 'e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855'.
Date (including time if available) when this media object was uploaded to this site.
definition_ko: 이 미디어 객체가 사이트에 업로드된 날짜·시간.

definition: The height of the item.
The width of the item.
The duration of the item (movie, audio recording, event, etc.) in [ISO 8601 duration format](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601).
The bitrate of the media object.
A URL pointing to a player for a specific video. In general this is the information in the src element of an embed tag and should not be the same as the content of the loc tag.
Given name. In the U.S. the first name of a Person.
Family name. In the U.S. the last name of a Person.
The job title of the person (for example, Financial Manager).
Organizations that the person works for.
An organization that this person is affiliated with. For example, a school/university, a club, or a team.
Date of birth.

Gender of something typically a Person but possibly also fictional characters animals etc. While https://schema.org/Male and https://schema.org/Female may be used text strings are also acceptable for people who do not identify as a binary gender.

Of a [[Person]], and less typically of an [[Organization]], to indicate a topic that is known about - suggesting possible expertise but not implying it. We do not distinguish skill levels here, or relate this to educational content, events, objectives or [[JobPosting]] descriptions.

Of a [[Person]], and less typically of an [[Organization]], to indicate a known language. We do not distinguish skill levels or reading/writing/speaking/signing here. Use language codes from the [IETF BCP 47 standard].
An organization that the person is an alumni of.
Physical address of the item.
Email address.
The telephone number.
The fax number.
A contact point for a person or organization.
A person or organization who founded this organization.
The date that this organization was founded.
The official name of the organization e.g. the registered company name.
An associated logo.
An Organization (or ProgramMembership) to which this Person or Organization belongs.
definition_ko: 이 사람·조직이 속한 Organization 또는 ProgramMembership.

definition: The larger organization that this organization is a [[subOrganization]] of if any. Supersedes branchOf.

A relationship between an organization and a department of that organization, also described as an organization (allowing different urls, logos, opening hours). For example: a store with a pharmacy, or a bakery with a cafe.
definition_ko: 조직과 그 조직의 부서 간 관계.

definition: The geo coordinates of the place.
The latitude of a location. For example `37.42242` ([WGS 84](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/World_Geodetic_System)).
The longitude of a location. For example `-122.08585` ([WGS 84](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/World_Geodetic_System)).
A URL to a map of the place.
The street address. For example 1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy.
The locality in which the street address is and which is in the region. For example Mountain View.
The region in which the locality is and which is in the country. For example California or another appropriate first-level Administrative division.
The postal code. For example 94043.

The country. Recommended to be in 2-letter [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1) format, for example "US". For backward compatibility, a 3-letter [ISO 3166-1 alpha-3](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-3) country code such as "SGP" or a full country name such as "Singapore" can also be used.

A person or organization can have different contact points for different purposes. For example a sales contact point a PR contact point and so on. This property is used to specify the kind of contact point.
A language someone may use with or at the item service or place. Please use one of the language codes from the [IETF BCP 47 standard]. See also [[inLanguage]].
The hours during which this service or contact is available.

The product or service this support contact point is related to (such as product support for a particular product line). This can be a specific product or product line (e.g. "iPhone") or a general category of products or services (e.g. "smartphones").

domain: schema:ContactPoint, schema:DeliveryChargeSpecification, schema:Demand, schema:Offer, schema:Organization, schema:Service
definition: The geographic area where a service or offered item is provided. Supersedes serviceArea.

The value of a [[QuantitativeValue]] (including [[Observation]]) or property value node. For [[QuantitativeValue]] and [[MonetaryAmount]], the recommended type for values is 'Number'. For [[PropertyValue]], it can be 'Text', 'Number', 'Boolean', or 'StructuredValue'.
notes: [TRUNCATED→BOOSTED] Original Schema.org rdfs:comment additional usage notes: 'Use values from 0123456789 (Unicode DIGIT ZERO U+0030 to DIGIT NINE U+0039) rather than superficially similar Unicode symbols. Use . (Unicode FULL STOP U+002E) rather than , to indicate a decimal point. Avoid using these symbols as a readability separator.' See source_url for canonical full text

definition: A commonly used identifier for the characteristic represented by the property e.g. a manufacturer or a standard code for a property.
definition_ko: 속성이 나타내는 특성에 대한 공통 식별자.

definition: The unit of measurement given using the UN/CEFACT Common Code (3 characters) or a URL. Other codes than the UN/CEFACT Common Code may be used with a prefix followed by a colon.
definition_ko: 측정 단위 (UN/CEFACT Common Code 3자 또는 URL).

definition: A string or text indicating the unit of measurement. Useful if you cannot provide a standard unit code for unitCode.
The upper value of some characteristic or property.
The lower value of some characteristic or property.

range: schema:DefinedTerm, schema:Enumeration, schema:MeasurementMethodEnum, schema:MeasurementTypeEnumeration, schema:PropertyValue, schema:QualitativeValue, schema:QuantitativeValue, schema:StructuredValue, schema:Text
definition: A secondary value that provides additional information on the original value, e.g. a reference temperature or a type of measurement.
definition_ko: 원본 값에 대한 추가 정보를 제공하는 보조 값 (예: 기준 온도, 측정 유형).

definition: A code that identifies this [[DefinedTerm]] within a [[DefinedTermSet]].
definition_ko: DefinedTermSet 내에서 이 DefinedTerm을 식별하는 코드.

definition: A [[DefinedTermSet]] that contains this term.
A Defined Term contained in this term set.
definition_ko: 이 용어 집합에 포함된 정의된 용어.

definition: FileObject is the Croissant class used to represent individual files that are part of a dataset.
definition_ko: 데이터셋의 개별 파일을 나타내는 Croissant 클래스.
notes: Inherits from sc:CreativeWork; can represent DigitalDocument/MediaObject

definition: In many datasets, data comes in the form of collections of homogeneous files, such as images, videos or text files, where each file needs to be treated as an individual item, e.g., as a training example. FileSet is a class that describes such collections of files.
definition_ko: 동질적인 파일들의 모음(이미지·비디오·텍스트 등)을 표현하는 클래스.

definition: A RecordSet describes a set of structured records obtained from one or more data sources (typically a file or set of files) and the structure of these records, expressed as a set of fields (e.g., the columns of a table). A RecordSet can represent flat or nested data.
definition_ko: 하나 이상의 데이터 소스에서 얻은 구조화된 레코드 집합과 그 구조(필드 모음)를 기술. 평면·중첩 데이터 모두 표현 가능.

definition: A Field is part of a RecordSet. It may represent a column of a table, or a nested data structure or even a nested RecordSet in the case of hierarchical data.
definition_ko: RecordSet의 일부. 테이블의 컬럼·중첩 구조·중첩 RecordSet을 표현 가능.

definition: DataSource is the class describing the data that can be extracted from files to populate a RecordSet.
definition_ko: RecordSet을 채우기 위해 파일에서 추출할 수 있는 데이터를 기술하는 클래스.

definition: Sometimes, not all the data from the source is needed, but only a subset. The Extract class can be used to specify how to do that, depending on the type of the data.
definition_ko: 소스에서 부분 데이터만 필요할 때 추출 방식을 지정하는 클래스.

definition: Croissant supports a few simple transformations that can be applied on the source data.
definition_ko: 소스 데이터에 적용할 수 있는 단순 변환들의 클래스.

definition: A format string used to parse the values coming from a DataSource.
definition_ko: DataSource에서 오는 값을 파싱하는 데 쓰이는 포맷 문자열.

definition: Croissant defines the type cr:BoundingBox that interprets any 4-float array as a bounding box.
definition_ko: 4-float 배열을 경계 박스로 해석하는 Croissant 타입.

definition: Segmentation masks are common annotations in computer vision. They describe pixel-perfect zones that outline objects or groups of objects in images or videos. Croissant defines cr:SegmentationMask with two manners to describe them.
definition_ko: 이미지·비디오에서 객체 영역을 픽셀 단위로 표시하는 분할 마스크 타입.
notes: Used as semantic dataType; can be sc:GeoShape (polygon) or sc:ImageObject

definition: ML datasets may come in different data splits, intended to be used for different steps of a model building.
definition_ko: ML 데이터셋의 데이터 분할을 표현하는 시맨틱 dataType 클래스.
notes: [CHECK] Spec describes via section intro rather than formal class definition. Used as dataType marker on RecordSet

definition: Identifies the training subset of a dataset (the split used to train ML models).
notes: [CHECK] Spec only shows in example data; no standalone formal definition. Definition synthesized from context

definition: Identifies the validation subset of a dataset (the split used to tune model hyperparameters).
notes: [CHECK] Spec only shows in example data; no standalone formal definition

definition: Identifies the test subset of a dataset (the split used to evaluate the final model).
notes: [CHECK] Spec only shows in example data; no standalone formal definition

definition: Most ML workflows use label data. In Croissant, we identify label data using the class cr:Label. Labels will typically appear as fields in a RecordSet. The default semantics is that labels apply to the record they are defined in.
definition_ko: ML 워크플로우의 레이블 데이터를 식별하는 클래스. RecordSet의 필드로 출현.

definition: A citation to the dataset itself, or a citation for a publication that describes the dataset. Ideally, citations should be expressed using the bibtex format. Note that this is different from schema.org/citation, which is used to make a citation to another publication from this dataset.
definition_ko: 데이터셋 자체 또는 데이터셋을 기술하는 출판물에 대한 인용. bibtex 형식 권장.

definition: A column name (used in Extract for CSV FileObject sources to extract values in the specified column).
notes: Spec defines via Extract table; quoted text combined from column header 'A column name' + result description

definition: Another FileObject or FileSet that this one is contained in, e.g., in the case of a file extracted from an archive. When this property is present, the contentUrl is evaluated as a relative path within the container object.
definition_ko: 이 파일이 포함된 다른 FileObject 또는 FileSet (예: 아카이브에서 추출된 파일).
notes: [CHECK] Not in JSON-LD context; defined in spec body only. MANY cardinality. FileSet definition extends: 'If multiple values are provided for containedIn, then the union of their contents is taken'

definition: One or more records that constitute the data of the RecordSet.
notes: MANY cardinality; @json typed in JSON-LD context

definition: The data type of the field, identified by the URI of the corresponding class. It could be either an atomic type (e.g, sc:Integer) or a semantic type (e.g., sc:GeoLocation).
definition_ko: 필드의 데이터 타입. 대응 클래스의 URI로 식별. 원자 타입(sc:Integer) 또는 시맨틱 타입(sc:GeoLocation) 가능.
notes: MANY cardinality; @vocab typed in JSON-LD context

definition: A property that is equivalent to this Field. Used in the case a dataType is specified on the RecordSet to map specific fields to specific properties associated with that dataType.
definition_ko: 이 Field에 동등한 속성. RecordSet에 dataType이 지정된 경우 특정 필드를 해당 dataType과 연관된 속성에 매핑할 때 사용.
notes: [CHECK] Not in JSON-LD context; defined in Field properties table. MANY cardinality

definition: One or more records provided as example content of the RecordSet, or a reference to data source that contains examples.
definition_ko: RecordSet의 예시 내용으로 제공되는 레코드 또는 예시를 담은 데이터 소스 참조.
notes: MANY cardinality; @json typed in JSON-LD context

definition: A glob pattern that specifies the files to exclude.
notes: [CHECK] Not in JSON-LD context; defined in FileSet properties table. MANY cardinality

definition: The extraction method from the provided source.
A data element that appears in the records of the RecordSet (e.g., one column of a table).
definition_ko: RecordSet의 레코드에 출현하는 데이터 요소 (예: 테이블의 한 컬럼).

definition: The name of the referenced FileObject source of the data.
One of: fullpath, filename, content, lines, lineNumbers (used in Extract on FileObject/FileSet to select a file-level property).
definition_ko: 파일 수준 속성 선택 (fullpath, filename, content, lines, lineNumbers 중 하나).
notes: Spec lists 5 enum values in Extract table

definition: The name of the referenced FileSet source of the data.
A format to parse the values of the data from text, e.g., a date format or number format.
definition_ko: 텍스트에서 데이터 값을 파싱하는 포맷 (예: 날짜·숫자 포맷).

definition: A glob pattern that specifies the files to include.
Whether the dataset is a live dataset.
notes: ONE cardinality. Live dataset = data evolves continuously (new snapshots released regularly)

definition: A JSONPath expression (used in Extract on JSON sources to select values).
definition_ko: JSON 소스에서 값을 선택하는 JSONPath 표현식.
notes: Defined in Extract table for JSON source

definition: One or more fields whose values uniquely identify each record in the RecordSet.
definition_ko: RecordSet의 각 레코드를 고유하게 식별하는 하나 이상의 필드.

definition: The MD5 checksum of the file contents.
notes: [CHECK] Not formally defined as a standalone property in spec body; appears only in JSON-LD context. Definition synthesized from sc:sha256 analogy

definition: A special case of SubField that should be hidden because it references a Field that already appears in the RecordSet.
definition_ko: RecordSet에 이미 출현한 Field를 참조하므로 감춰야 하는 SubField의 특수 형태.

definition: (No definition provided in specification body)
notes: [CHECK] Appears only in JSON-LD context (Appendix 1); no description in spec body. Possibly reserved/forward-looking

definition: The name of the referenced RecordSet source.
notes: ONE cardinality per DataSource table. Same alias also used at sc:Dataset level to list RecordSets (MANY); spec doesn't formally define dual-domain usage. [CHECK]

definition: Another Field of another RecordSet that this field references. This is the equivalent of a foreign key reference in a relational database.
definition_ko: 이 필드가 참조하는 다른 RecordSet의 다른 Field. 관계형 DB의 외래 키에 해당.

definition: A regular expression to parse the data.
If true, then the Field is a list of values of type dataType.
definition_ko: true이면 Field는 dataType 타입의 값 리스트가 됨.

definition: A string replacement operation applied to source data values.
definition_ko: 소스 데이터 값에 적용되는 문자열 치환 연산.
notes: [CHECK] Not formally defined in spec body text; only appears in JSON-LD context. Definition synthesized from Transform context

definition: The character used to split a string into an array.
definition_ko: 문자열을 배열로 분할하는 데 사용되는 문자.
notes: [CHECK] Spec mentions 'delimiter' in Transform list but JSON-LD context uses 'separator' (cr:separator). Likely terminology mismatch in spec

definition: The data source of the field. This will generally reference a FileObject or FileSet's contents (e.g.
definition_ko: a specific column of a table).
concept_tag: 필드의 데이터 소스. 일반적으로 FileObject·FileSet의 내용을 참조 (예: 테이블의 특정 컬럼).

definition: Another Field that is nested inside this one.
definition_ko: 이 Field 안에 중첩된 또 다른 Field.

definition: A transformation to apply on source data on top of the extracted method as specified through extract, e.g., a regular expression or JSON query.
definition_ko: extract로 지정된 추출 방식 위에 소스 데이터에 적용할 변환 (예: 정규 표현식·JSON 쿼리).

definition: A curated collection of metadata about resources.
A record in a data catalog, describing the registration of a single dataset or data service.
definition_ko: 데이터 카탈로그 내 단일 데이터셋·데이터 서비스의 등록 기술 레코드.

definition: A site or end-point providing operations related to the discovery of, access to, or processing functions on, data or related resources.
definition_ko: 데이터·관련 자원의 발견·접근·처리 기능을 제공하는 사이트 또는 엔드포인트.

definition: A collection of data, published or curated by a single source, and available for access or download in one or more representations.
definition_ko: 단일 출처가 발행·큐레이트하며 하나 이상의 형태로 접근·다운로드 가능한 데이터 모음.

definition: A collection of datasets that are published separately, but share some common characteristics that groups them.
definition_ko: 별도로 발행되지만 공통 특성으로 묶이는 데이터셋들의 모음.

definition: A specific representation of a dataset. A dataset might be available in multiple serializations that may differ in various ways, including natural language, media-type or format, schematic organization, temporal and spatial resolution, level of detail or profiles (which might specify any or all of the above).
definition_ko: 데이터셋의 특정 표현. 자연어·미디어 타입·포맷·스키마·시공간 해상도·상세도·프로파일 등에서 다를 수 있음.

definition: An association class for attaching additional information to a relationship between DCAT Resources.
definition_ko: DCAT Resource 간 관계에 추가 정보를 부착하기 위한 연결 클래스.

definition: Resource published or curated by a single agent.
notes: New class added in DCAT 2; superclass of Dataset/DataService/Catalog

definition: A role is the function of a resource or agent with respect to another resource, in the context of resource attribution or resource relationships.
definition_ko: 자원 귀속·관계 맥락에서 자원·행위자가 다른 자원에 대해 가지는 기능.

definition: A site or end-point that gives access to the distribution of the dataset.
definition_ko: 이 배포본에 접근 가능한 사이트 또는 엔드포인트.
notes: [CHECK] No formal rdfs:domain in ontology; spec usage indicates dcat:Distribution. New property in DCAT 2

definition: A URL of a resource that gives access to a distribution of the dataset. E.g. landing page, feed, SPARQL endpoint. Use for all cases except a simple download link, in which case downloadURL is preferred.
definition_ko: 배포본에 접근 가능한 자원의 URL. 랜딩 페이지·피드·SPARQL 엔드포인트 등 단순 다운로드 링크가 아닌 경우 사용.

definition: The geographic bounding box of a spatial thing [SDW-BP].
The size of a distribution in bytes.
notes: Spec note: literal value should be typed as xsd:decimal

definition: A catalog that is listed in the catalog.
The geographic center (centroid) of a spatial thing [SDW-BP].
The compression format of the distribution in which the data is contained in a compressed form, e.g. to reduce the size of the downloadable file.
definition_ko: 데이터가 압축 형태로 담긴 배포본의 압축 포맷 (예: ZIP).

definition: Relevant contact information for the catalogued resource. Use of vCard is recommended.
definition_ko: 카탈로그 자원의 연락처 정보. vCard 사용 권장.

definition: A dataset that is listed in the catalog.
An available distribution of the dataset.
The URL of the downloadable file in a given format. E.g. CSV file or RDF file. The format is indicated by the distribution's dcterms:format and/or dcat:mediaType.
definition_ko: 특정 포맷의 다운로드 가능 파일 URL. 포맷은 dcterms:format 또는 dcat:mediaType로 표시.

definition: The end of the period.
A description of the service end-point, including its operations, parameters etc.
definition_ko: 서비스 엔드포인트의 기술 (운영, 매개변수 등 포함).

definition: The root location or primary endpoint of the service (a web-resolvable IRI).
definition_ko: 서비스의 루트 또는 기본 엔드포인트 (웹 해석 가능 IRI).

definition: The first resource in an ordered collection or series of resources, to which the current resource belongs.
definition_ko: 현재 자원이 속한 정렬된 모음·시리즈의 첫 자원.

definition: This resource has a more specific, versioned resource with equivalent content [PAV].
definition_ko: 이 자원의 동등한 내용을 가진 더 구체적인 버전 자원.

definition: This resource has a more specific, versioned resource [PAV].
definition_ko: 이 자원의 더 구체적인 버전 자원.

definition: The function of an entity or agent with respect to another entity or resource.
definition_ko: 다른 개체·자원에 대해 개체·행위자가 가지는 기능.

definition: An available distribution of the dataset.
notes: [CHECK] Inverse-only property; .ttl has only owl:inverseOf dcat:distribution. Definition borrowed from inverse property. New in DCAT 3

definition: This resource has a more specific, versioned resource [PAV].
definition_ko: 이 자원이 버전화의 대상이 되는 상위 자원 (dcat:hasVersion의 역).
notes: [CHECK] Inverse-only property; definition borrowed from inverse property dcat:hasVersion. New in DCAT 3

definition: A resource that is listed in the catalog.
notes: [CHECK] Inverse-only property; definition borrowed from inverse property dcat:resource. New in DCAT 3

definition: A dataset series of which the dataset is part.
A keyword or tag describing a resource.
A Web page that can be navigated to in a Web browser to gain access to the catalog, a dataset, its distributions and/or additional information.
definition_ko: 웹 브라우저로 접근하여 카탈로그·데이터셋·배포본·추가 정보를 얻을 수 있는 웹 페이지.

definition: The last resource in an ordered collection or series of resources, to which the current resource belongs.
definition_ko: 현재 자원이 속한 정렬된 모음·시리즈의 마지막 자원.

definition: The media type of the distribution as defined by IANA.
The previous resource (before the current one) in an ordered collection or series of resources.
notes: [CHECK] Inverse-only property; definition borrowed from inverse property dcat:prev. New in DCAT 3

definition: The previous version of a resource in a lineage [PAV].
definition_ko: 이 자원의 lineage 상 다음 버전 (dcat:previousVersion의 역).
notes: [CHECK] Inverse-only property; definition borrowed from inverse property dcat:previousVersion. New in DCAT 3

definition: The package format of the distribution in which one or more data files are grouped together, e.g. to enable a set of related files to be downloaded together.
definition_ko: 하나 이상의 데이터 파일이 함께 묶여 있는 배포본의 패키지 포맷.
notes: [CHECK] subPropertyOf dcterms:format inferred from spec; not in .ttl block read

definition: The previous resource (before the current one) in an ordered collection or series of resources.
definition_ko: 정렬된 모음·시리즈에서 현재 자원의 이전 자원.

definition: The previous version of a resource in a lineage [PAV].
Link to a description of a relationship with another resource.
definition_ko: 다른 자원과의 관계 기술에 대한 링크.

definition: A record describing the registration of a single dataset or data service that is part of the catalog.
definition_ko: 이 카탈로그에 등재된 단일 데이터셋·데이터 서비스의 등록 기술 레코드.

definition: A resource that is listed in the catalog.
A dataset series of which the dataset is part.
notes: [CHECK] Inverse-only property; definition borrowed from inverse property dcat:inSeries. New in DCAT 3

definition: A collection of data that this DataService can distribute.
definition_ko: 이 데이터 서비스가 배포할 수 있는 데이터 모음.

definition: A service that is listed in the catalog.
minimum spatial separation resolvable in a dataset, measured in meters.
definition_ko: 데이터셋에서 식별 가능한 최소 공간 분리능 (미터).
notes: New in DCAT 2. en-US 'meters' / en-GB 'metres' both defined; quoted en-US form

definition: The start of the period
minimum time period resolvable in a dataset.
definition_ko: 데이터셋에서 식별 가능한 최소 시간 간격.

definition: A main category of the resource. A resource can have multiple themes.
definition_ko: 자원의 주된 카테고리. 자원은 여러 테마를 가질 수 있음.

definition: The knowledge organization system (KOS) used to classify catalog's datasets.
The version indicator (name or identifier) of a resource.
A name given to the resource.
notes: DCAT v3 normative dependency for sc:name equivalent

definition: An account of the resource.
notes: DCAT v3 normative dependency. Spec scope-note: "Description may include but is not limited to: an abstract, a table of contents, a graphical representation, or a free-text account of the resource."

definition: An unambiguous reference to the resource within a given context.
definition_ko: 주어진 맥락 내 자원의 명확한 참조.

definition: Date of formal issuance of the resource.
Date on which the resource was changed.
A language of the resource.
A legal document giving official permission to do something with the resource.
definition_ko: 자원에 공식 허가를 부여하는 법적 문서.

definition: Information about rights held in and over the resource.
Information about who access the resource or an indication of its security status.
definition_ko: 자원에 접근할 수 있는 사람 또는 보안 상태에 대한 정보.

definition: An entity responsible for making the resource.
An entity responsible for making the resource available.
definition_ko: 자원을 이용 가능하게 하는 책임이 있는 개체.

definition: The file format, physical medium, or dimensions of the resource.
definition_ko: 자원의 파일 포맷, 물리 매체 또는 치수.

definition: The nature or genre of the resource.
A topic of the resource.
A related resource.
notes: DCAT v3 normative dependency. Parent of conformsTo/hasPart/isPartOf/isReferencedBy/references/source

definition: An established standard to which the described resource conforms.
notes: DCAT v3 normative dependency. Croissant requires this with value http://mlcommons.org/croissant/1.0

definition: A related resource that is included either physically or logically in the described resource.
definition_ko: 기술된 자원에 물리적·논리적으로 포함된 관련 자원.

definition: A related resource in which the described resource is physically or logically included.
definition_ko: 기술된 자원이 물리적·논리적으로 포함된 상위 관련 자원.

definition: A related resource that references, cites, or otherwise points to the described resource.
A related resource that is referenced, cited, or otherwise pointed to by the described resource.
A related resource from which the described resource is derived.
definition_ko: 기술된 자원의 파생 출처가 된 관련 자원.

definition: Spatial characteristics of the resource.
Temporal characteristics of the resource.
The frequency with which items are added to a collection.
notes: DCAT v3 normative dependency. Domain is dcmitype:Collection

definition: A person or organization owning or managing rights over the resource.
An entity is a physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects; entities may be real or imaginary.
definition_ko: 물리적·디지털·개념적 등 어떤 종류의 사물로서 고정된 측면을 가진 대상.

definition: An activity is something that occurs over a period of time and acts upon or with entities; it may include consuming, processing, transforming, modifying, relocating, using, or generating entities.
definition_ko: 일정 기간에 걸쳐 일어나며 개체에 작용하거나 개체와 함께 작용하는 사건.

definition: An agent is something that bears some form of responsibility for an activity taking place, for the existence of an entity, or for another agent's activity.
definition_ko: 활동·개체의 존재·다른 행위자의 활동에 대해 책임을 지는 존재.

definition: A collection is an entity that provides a structure to some constituents, which are themselves entities. These constituents are said to be member of the collections.
definition_ko: 구성 개체들에 구조를 제공하는 개체. 구성 요소는 멤버로 칭함.

definition: An empty collection is a collection without members.
A bundle is a named set of provenance descriptions, and is itself an Entity, so allowing provenance of provenance to be expressed.
definition_ko: 프로비넌스 기술의 이름 있는 집합. 자체도 Entity이므로 프로비넌스의 프로비넌스 표현 가능.

definition: A plan is an entity that represents a set of actions or steps intended by one or more agents to achieve some goals.
definition_ko: 하나 이상의 행위자가 목적 달성을 위해 의도한 행동·단계의 집합을 나타내는 개체.

definition: Person agents are people.
A software agent is running software.
An organization is a social or legal institution such as a company, society, etc.

A location can be an identifiable geographic place (ISO 19112), but it can also be a non-geographic place such as a directory, row, or column. As such, there are numerous ways in which location can be expressed, such as by a coordinate, address, landmark, and so forth.
definition_ko: 식별 가능한 지리적 장소 또는 디렉터리·행·열 등 비지리적 장소를 포함하는 위치.

definition: Influence is the capacity of an entity, activity, or agent to have an effect on the character, development, or behavior of another by means of usage, start, end, generation, invalidation, communication, derivation, attribution, association, or delegation.
definition_ko: 사용·시작·종료·생성·무효화·소통·파생·귀속·연계·위임을 통해 다른 자원의 성격·발전·행동에 영향을 미칠 수 있는 능력.
notes: Qualified class. Top of qualified hierarchy

definition: Influence where the influencer is an Entity.
notes: [CHECK] No :definition or rdfs:comment in PROV-O ontology; definition inferred from class hierarchy

definition: Influence where the influencer is an Activity.
notes: [CHECK] No :definition or rdfs:comment in PROV-O ontology; definition inferred from class hierarchy

definition: Influence where the influencer is an Agent.
notes: [CHECK] No :definition or rdfs:comment in PROV-O ontology; definition inferred from class hierarchy

definition: The PROV data model is implicitly based on a notion of instantaneous events (or just events), that mark transitions in the world. Events include generation, usage, or invalidation of entities, as well as starting or ending of activities. This notion of event is not first-class in the data model, but it is useful for explaining its other concepts and its semantics.
definition_ko: 세계의 전이를 나타내는 순간 이벤트 개념. 생성·사용·무효화·시작·종료 이벤트가 이에 해당함.

definition: Generation is the completion of production of a new entity by an activity. This entity did not exist before generation and becomes available for usage after this generation.
definition_ko: 활동에 의한 새 개체 생산의 완료. 생성 이전에 개체는 없었고 이후 사용 가능해짐.

definition: Usage is the beginning of utilizing an entity by an activity. Before usage, the activity had not begun to utilize this entity and could not have been affected by the entity.
definition_ko: 활동이 개체를 이용하기 시작하는 시점. 이전에는 활동이 해당 개체에 영향받지 않음.

definition: Communication is the exchange of an entity by two activities, one activity using the entity generated by the other.
definition_ko: 한 활동이 다른 활동이 생성한 개체를 사용함으로써 일어나는 두 활동 간의 개체 교환.

definition: Start is when an activity is deemed to have been started by an entity, known as trigger. The activity did not exist before its start. Any usage, generation, or invalidation involving an activity follows the activity's start. A start may refer to a trigger entity that set off the activity, or to an activity, known as starter, that generated the trigger.
definition_ko: 활동이 트리거 개체에 의해 시작되었다고 간주되는 시점. 시작 이전에 활동은 존재하지 않음.

definition: End is when an activity is deemed to have been ended by an entity, known as trigger. The activity no longer exists after its end. Any usage, generation, or invalidation involving an activity precedes the activity's end. An end may refer to a trigger entity that terminated the activity, or to an activity, known as ender that generated the trigger.
definition_ko: 활동이 트리거 개체에 의해 종료되었다고 간주되는 시점. 종료 이후 활동은 존재하지 않음.

definition: Invalidation is the start of the destruction, cessation, or expiry of an existing entity by an activity. The entity is no longer available for use (or further invalidation) after invalidation. Any generation or usage of an entity precedes its invalidation.
definition_ko: 활동에 의한 기존 개체의 파괴·중단·만료 시작. 무효화 이후 개체는 사용 불가.

definition: A derivation is a transformation of an entity into another, an update of an entity resulting in a new one, or the construction of a new entity based on a pre-existing entity.
definition_ko: 한 개체에서 다른 개체로의 변환·갱신·신규 구성 관계.

definition: A quotation is the repeat of (some or all of) an entity, such as text or image, by someone who may or may not be its original author. Quotation is a particular case of derivation.
definition_ko: 원저자 여부와 무관하게 텍스트·이미지 등 개체의 일부 또는 전부를 반복함. 파생의 특수 형태.

definition: A revision is a derivation for which the resulting entity is a revised version of some original. The implication here is that the resulting entity contains substantial content from the original. Revision is a particular case of derivation.
definition_ko: 결과 개체가 원본의 개정 버전인 파생. 원본의 상당 부분이 결과에 포함됨.

definition: A primary source for a topic refers to something produced by some agent with direct experience and knowledge about the topic, at the time of the topic's study, without benefit from hindsight.
definition_ko: 연구 시점에 주제에 대한 직접 경험·지식을 가진 행위자가 생산한 1차 자료.
notes: [TRUNCATED→BOOSTED] 원문 전체 (3 paragraphs): 'A primary source for a topic refers to something produced by some agent with direct experience and knowledge about the topic, at the time of the topic's study, without benefit from hindsight. Because of the directness of primary sources, they speak for themselves in ways that cannot be captured through the filter of secondary sources. As such, it is important for secondary sources to reference those primary sources from which they were derived, so that their reliability can be investigated. A primary source relation is a particular case of derivation of secondary materials from their primary sources. It is recognized that the determination of primary sources can be up to interpretation, and should be done according to conventions accepted within the application's domain.' Qualified form of hadPrimarySource.

definition: Attribution is the ascribing of an entity to an agent.
notes: [TRUNCATED→BOOSTED] 원문 전체 (2 paragraphs): 'Attribution is the ascribing of an entity to an agent. When an entity e is attributed to agent ag, entity e was generated by some unspecified activity that in turn was associated to agent ag. Thus, this relation is useful when the activity is not known, or irrelevant.' Qualified form of wasAttributedTo. 'attribution' is broader than 'creator' but maps closest

definition: An activity association is an assignment of responsibility to an agent for an activity, indicating that the agent had a role in the activity. It further allows for a plan to be specified, which is the plan intended by the agent to achieve some goals in the context of this activity.
definition_ko: 활동에 대한 행위자의 책임 부여. 행위자가 역할을 가지며 의도한 Plan을 함께 명시할 수 있음.

definition: Delegation is the assignment of authority and responsibility to an agent (by itself or by another agent) to carry out a specific activity as a delegate or representative, while the agent it acts on behalf of retains some responsibility for the outcome of the delegated work.
definition_ko: 특정 활동을 대리·대표로서 수행하도록 행위자에게 권한·책임을 위임함. 위임자는 결과에 대한 일부 책임을 유지함.
notes: [TRUNCATED→BOOSTED] 원문 전체 (2 paragraphs): 'Delegation is the assignment of authority and responsibility to an agent (by itself or by another agent) to carry out a specific activity as a delegate or representative, while the agent it acts on behalf of retains some responsibility for the outcome of the delegated work. For example, a student acted on behalf of his supervisor, who acted on behalf of the department chair, who acted on behalf of the university; all those agents are responsible in some way for the activity that took place but we do not say explicitly who bears responsibility and to what degree.' Qualified form of actedOnBehalfOf.

definition: A role is the function of an entity or agent with respect to an activity, in the context of a usage, generation, invalidation, association, start, and end.
definition_ko: 사용·생성·무효화·연계·시작·종료의 맥락에서 개체나 행위자가 활동에 대해 가지는 기능.

definition: Generation is the completion of production of a new entity by an activity. This entity did not exist before generation and becomes available for usage after this generation.
notes: [CHECK] PROV-O ontology에 :definition/rdfs:comment 없음; 대응 qualified class prov:Generation의 정의를 차용. Starting-point property

definition: A prov:Entity that was used by this prov:Activity. For example, :baking prov:used :spoon, :egg, :oven .
An activity a2 is dependent on or informed by another activity a1, by way of some unspecified entity that is generated by a1 and used by a2.
definition_ko: 한 활동이 다른 활동에 의존하거나 정보를 받음. 매개 개체는 명시되지 않음.

definition: A derivation is a transformation of an entity into another, an update of an entity resulting in a new one, or the construction of a new entity based on a pre-existing entity.
Attribution is the ascribing of an entity to an agent.
notes: Starting-point property. attribution semantics broader than creator

definition: An prov:Agent that had some (unspecified) responsibility for the occurrence of this prov:Activity.
definition_ko: 이 활동의 발생에 책임을 가진 행위자.

definition: An object property to express the accountability of an agent towards another agent. The subordinate agent acted on behalf of the responsible agent in an actual activity.
definition_ko: 한 행위자가 다른 행위자를 대신해 활동했음을 표현하는 책임 위임 관계.

definition: The time at which an activity started. See also prov:endedAtTime.
The time at which an activity ended. See also prov:startedAtTime.
Two alternate entities present aspects of the same thing. These aspects may be the same or different and the alternate entities may or may not overlap in time.
definition_ko: 같은 사물의 다른 측면을 나타내는 대체 개체.
notes: Expanded property. Original text uses comma which has been preserved

definition: An entity that is a specialization of another shares all aspects of the latter, and additionally presents more specific aspects of the same thing as the latter. In particular, the lifetime of the entity being specialized contains that of any specialization. Examples of aspects include a time period, an abstraction, and a context associated with the entity.
definition_ko: 대상 개체의 모든 측면을 공유하면서 더 구체적인 측면을 추가로 가지는 특수화 개체.

definition: A primary source for a topic refers to something produced by some agent with direct experience and knowledge about the topic, at the time of the topic's study, without benefit from hindsight.
notes: [CHECK] PROV-O ontology에 :definition/rdfs:comment 없음; 대응 qualified class prov:PrimarySource의 정의를 차용. Expanded property

definition: An entity is derived from an original entity by copying, or 'quoting', some or all of it.
definition_ko: 원본 개체의 일부 또는 전부를 복사·인용하여 파생된 관계.

definition: A revision is a derivation that revises an entity into a revised version.
notes: Source: rdfs:comment. Expanded property; also owl:AnnotationProperty

definition: Invalidation is the start of the destruction, cessation, or expiry of an existing entity by an activity. The entity is no longer available for use (or further invalidation) after invalidation. Any generation or usage of an entity precedes its invalidation.
notes: [CHECK] PROV-O ontology에 :definition/rdfs:comment 없음; 대응 qualified class prov:Invalidation의 정의를 차용. Expanded property

definition: A collection is an entity that provides a structure to some constituents, which are themselves entities. These constituents are said to be member of the collections.
notes: [CHECK] PROV-O ontology에 정의 없이 :sharesDefinitionWith :Collection 사용. Expanded property

definition: Start is when an activity is deemed to have started. A start may refer to an entity, known as trigger, that initiated the activity.
End is when an activity is deemed to have ended. An end may refer to an entity, known as trigger, that terminated the activity.
Generation is the completion of production of a new entity by an activity. This entity did not exist before generation and becomes available for usage after this generation.

Invalidation is the start of the destruction, cessation, or expiry of an existing entity by an activity. The entity is no longer available for use (or further invalidation) after invalidation. Any generation or usage of an entity precedes its invalidation.

Influence is the capacity of an entity, activity, or agent to have an effect on the character, development, or behavior of another by means of usage, start, end, generation, invalidation, communication, derivation, attribution, association, or delegation.
definition_ko: 이 자원이 영향을 끼친 대상 (wasInfluencedBy의 역).

definition: Because prov:wasInfluencedBy is a broad relation, its more specific subproperties (e.g. prov:wasInformedBy, prov:actedOnBehalfOf, prov:wasEndedBy, etc.) should be used when applicable.
definition_ko: 이 자원이 영향을 받은 대상 (포괄 관계).
notes: Source: rdfs:comment. Top-level expanded/qualified property; prefer subproperties

definition: The Location of any resource.
The time at which an entity was completely created and is available for use.
definition_ko: 개체가 완전히 생성되어 사용 가능해진 시점.

definition: The time at which an entity was invalidated (i.e., no longer usable).
definition_ko: 개체가 무효화된 (더 이상 사용 불가능한) 시점.

definition: Provides a value that is a direct representation of an entity.
The time at which an InstantaneousEvent occurred, in the form of xsd:dateTime.
If this Activity prov:generated Entity :e, then it can qualify how it performed the Generation using prov:qualifiedGeneration [ a prov:Generation; prov:entity :e; :foo :bar ].
definition_ko: wasGeneratedBy의 한정 형태로 추가 속성을 부여함.

definition: If this Activity prov:used Entity :e, then it can qualify how it used it using prov:qualifiedUsage [ a prov:Usage; prov:entity :e; :foo :bar ].
definition_ko: used의 한정 형태로 추가 속성을 부여함.

definition: If this Entity prov:wasDerivedFrom Entity :e, then it can qualify how it was derived using prov:qualifiedDerivation [ a prov:Derivation; prov:entity :e; :foo :bar ].
definition_ko: wasDerivedFrom의 한정 형태로 추가 속성을 부여함.

definition: If this Entity prov:wasAttributedTo Agent :ag, then it can qualify how it was influenced using prov:qualifiedAttribution [ a prov:Attribution; prov:agent :ag; :foo :bar ].
definition_ko: wasAttributedTo의 한정 형태로 추가 속성을 부여함.

definition: If this Entity prov:wasInvalidatedBy Activity :a, then it can qualify how it was invalidated using prov:qualifiedInvalidation [ a prov:Invalidation; prov:activity :a; :foo :bar ].
definition_ko: wasInvalidatedBy의 한정 형태로 추가 속성을 부여함.

definition: If this Activity prov:wasStartedBy Entity :e1, then it can qualify how it was started using prov:qualifiedStart [ a prov:Start; prov:entity :e1; :foo :bar ].
definition_ko: wasStartedBy의 한정 형태로 추가 속성을 부여함.

definition: If this Activity prov:wasEndedBy Entity :e1, then it can qualify how it was ended using prov:qualifiedEnd [ a prov:End; prov:entity :e1; :foo :bar ].
definition_ko: wasEndedBy의 한정 형태로 추가 속성을 부여함.

definition: If this Activity prov:wasInformedBy Activity :a, then it can qualify how it was influenced using prov:qualifiedCommunication [ a prov:Communication; prov:activity :a; :foo :bar ].
definition_ko: wasInformedBy의 한정 형태로 추가 속성을 부여함.

definition: If this Activity prov:wasAssociatedWith Agent :ag, then it can qualify the Association using prov:qualifiedAssociation [ a prov:Association; prov:agent :ag; :foo :bar ].
definition_ko: wasAssociatedWith의 한정 형태로 추가 속성을 부여함.

definition: If this Agent prov:actedOnBehalfOf Agent :ag, then it can qualify how with prov:qualifiedResponsibility [ a prov:Responsibility; prov:agent :ag; :foo :bar ].
definition_ko: actedOnBehalfOf의 한정 형태로 추가 속성을 부여함.
notes: Source: rdfs:comment (uses 'qualifiedResponsibility' label as legacy term in spec example). Qualified property

definition: Because prov:qualifiedInfluence is a broad relation, the more specific relations (qualifiedCommunication, qualifiedDelegation, qualifiedEnd, etc.) should be used when applicable.
notes: Source: rdfs:comment. Top-level qualified property; prefer subproperties

definition: If this Entity prov:hadPrimarySource Entity :e, then it can qualify how using prov:qualifiedPrimarySource [ a prov:PrimarySource; prov:entity :e; :foo :bar ].
definition_ko: hadPrimarySource의 한정 형태로 추가 속성을 부여함.

definition: If this Entity prov:wasQuotedFrom Entity :e, then it can qualify how using prov:qualifiedQuotation [ a prov:Quotation; prov:entity :e; :foo :bar ].
definition_ko: wasQuotedFrom의 한정 형태로 추가 속성을 부여함.

definition: If this Entity prov:wasRevisionOf Entity :e, then it can qualify how it was revised using prov:qualifiedRevision [ a prov:Revision; prov:entity :e; :foo :bar ].
definition_ko: wasRevisionOf의 한정 형태로 추가 속성을 부여함.

definition: This property behaves in spirit like rdf:object; it references the object of a prov:wasInfluencedBy triple.
This property behaves in spirit like rdf:object; it references the object of a prov:wasInfluencedBy triple.
This property behaves in spirit like rdf:object; it references the object of a prov:wasInfluencedBy triple.

Subproperties of prov:influencer are used to cite the object of an unqualified PROV-O triple whose predicate is a subproperty of prov:wasInfluencedBy (e.g. prov:used, prov:wasGeneratedBy). prov:influencer is used much like rdf:object is used.
definition_ko: 한정된 Influence 관계의 영향원을 가리키는 포괄 속성.

definition: The _optional_ Activity of an Influence, which used, generated, invalidated, or was the responsibility of some Entity. This property is _not_ used by ActivityInfluence (use prov:activity instead).
The _optional_ Generation involved in an Entity's Derivation.
The _optional_ Usage involved in an Entity's Derivation.
The _optional_ Plan adopted by an Agent in Association with some Activity. Plan specifications are out of the scope of this specification.

The _optional_ Role that an Entity assumed in the context of an Activity. For example, :baking prov:used :spoon; prov:qualified [ a prov:Usage; prov:entity :spoon; prov:hadRole roles:mixing_implement ].
Represents the evaluation of a given dataset (or dataset distribution) against a specific quality metric.
definition_ko: 주어진 데이터셋(또는 배포본)을 특정 품질 메트릭에 대해 평가한 결과.

definition: Represents a standard to measure a quality dimension. An observation (instance of dqv:QualityMeasurement) assigns a value in a given unit to a Metric.
definition_ko: 품질 차원을 측정하는 표준. QualityMeasurement는 단위 값을 Metric에 할당함.

definition: Represents criteria relevant for assessing quality. Each quality dimension must have one or more metric to measure it. A dimension is linked with a category using the dqv:inCategory property.
definition_ko: 품질 평가에 관련된 기준. 각 차원은 하나 이상의 메트릭을 가져야 함.

definition: Represents a group of quality dimensions in which a common type of information is used as quality indicator.
definition_ko: 공통 정보 유형을 품질 지표로 사용하는 품질 차원들의 그룹.

definition: Represents a dataset of quality measurements, evaluations of one or more datasets (or dataset distributions) against specific quality metrics.
definition_ko: 하나 이상의 데이터셋(또는 배포본)을 특정 품질 메트릭에 대해 평가한 측정값의 데이터셋.

definition: Represents a policy or agreement that is chiefly governed by data quality concerns.
definition_ko: 주로 데이터 품질 관심사에 의해 좌우되는 정책 또는 합의.

definition: Represents quality annotations, including ratings, quality certificates or feedback that can be associated to datasets or distributions. Quality annotations must have one oa:motivatedBy statement with an instance of oa:Motivation (and skos:Concept) that reflects a quality assessment purpose.
definition_ko: 데이터셋·배포본에 연관 가능한 품질 주석 (등급·증명서·피드백 포함). oa:motivatedBy에 dqv:qualityAssessment 인스턴스 필요.

definition: An annotation that associates a resource (especially, a dataset or a distribution) to another resource (for example, a document) that certifies the resource's quality according to a set of quality assessment rules.
definition_ko: 자원(특히 데이터셋·배포본)을 품질 평가 규칙에 따라 품질을 증명하는 다른 자원(예: 문서)에 연결하는 주석.

definition: Represents feedback that users have on the quality of datasets or distributions.
definition_ko: 사용자가 데이터셋·배포본의 품질에 대해 가지는 피드백.

definition: Represents quality metadata, it is defined to group quality certificates, policies, measurements and annotations under a named graph.
definition_ko: 품질 메타데이터를 표현. 품질 증명서·정책·측정·주석을 named graph로 묶기 위해 정의됨.

definition: Indicates the metric being observed.

Refers to the resource (e.g., a dataset, a linkset, a graph, a set of triples) on which the quality measurement is performed. In the DQV context, this property is generally expected to be used in statements in which objects are instances of dcat:Dataset or dcat:Distribution.
Refers to values computed by metric.
Represents the expected data type for metric's observed value (e.g. xsd:boolean xsd:double etc...)
definition_ko: 메트릭의 관찰값에 대한 기대 데이터 타입 (예: xsd:boolean, xsd:double).

definition: Represents the category a dimension is grouped in.
Represents the dimensions a quality metric, certificate and annotation allow a measurement of.

Refers to the performed quality measurements. Quality measurements can be performed to any kind of resource (e.g., a dataset, a linkset, a graph, a set of triples). However, in the DQV context, this property is generally expected to be used in statements in which subjects are instances of dcat:Dataset or dcat:Distribution.
definition_ko: 수행된 품질 측정을 가리킴. DQV 맥락에서 주어는 일반적으로 dcat:Dataset 또는 dcat:Distribution 인스턴스.

definition: Refers to a grouping of quality information such as certificates, policies, measurements and annotations as a named graph. Quality information represented in such a grouping can pertain to any kind of resource.
definition_ko: 품질 증명서·정책·측정·주석 등 품질 정보의 named graph 묶음을 가리킴.

definition: Refers to a quality annotation. Quality annotation can be applied to any kind of resource. In the DQV context this property is generally expected to be used in statements in which subjects are instances of dcat:Dataset or dcat:Distribution.
definition_ko: 품질 주석을 가리킴. DQV 맥락에서 주어는 일반적으로 dcat:Dataset 또는 dcat:Distribution.

definition: Motivation that must be specified for quality annotations.
definition_ko: 품질 주석에 대해 반드시 명시되어야 하는 motivation.

definition: Precision is a quality dimension, which refers to the recorded level of details. It represents the exactness of a measurement or description. It is equivalent the notion of Precision from ISO 25012.
definition_ko: 기록된 상세 수준을 가리키는 품질 차원. 측정·기술의 정확성. ISO 25012의 Precision 개념과 동등.

definition: A persistent identifier that identifies a resource.
equivalent_terms: dcterms:identifier, schema:identifier, tta0976:Repository_Identifier, tta0976:Collection_Identifier, tta0976:Dataset_Identifier, tta0976:File_Identifier

definition: The type of Identifier.
notes: DataCite Schema 4.5 sub-property #1.1. Controlled list (DOI/ARK/Handle/URL/URN/etc.) — TTA-0976이 직접 인용

definition: The main researchers involved in producing the data, or the authors of the publication, in priority order.
definition_ko: 데이터 생산에 관여한 주된 연구자 또는 출판물의 저자 (우선순위 순).
equivalent_terms: dcterms:creator, schema:creator, prov:Creator, tta0976:Collection_Creator, tta0976:Dataset_Creator, tta0976:File_Creator

definition: The full name of the creator.
The type of name. Allowed values: Personal, Organizational.
The personal or first name of the creator.
The surname or last name of the creator.
Uniquely identifies an individual or legal entity according to various schemes (e.g. ORCID).
definition_ko: 개인 또는 법인을 식별하는 고유 식별자 (예: ORCID).

definition: The organizational or institutional affiliation of the creator.
A name or title by which a resource is known.
The type of Title. Allowed values: AlternativeTitle, Subtitle, TranslatedTitle, Other.
notes: DataCite sub-property #3.1. TTA-0976 TitleType 통제어가 직접 인용

definition: The name of the entity that holds, archives, publishes, prints, distributes, releases, issues, or produces the resource.
The year when the resource is made publicly available.
Subject, keyword, classification code, or key phrase describing the resource.
equivalent_terms: dcterms:subject, dcat:theme, schema:about, tta0976:Collection_Subject, tta0976:Dataset_Subject, tta0976:File_Subject

definition: The name of the subject scheme or classification code or authority if one is used.
The URI of the subject identifier scheme.
The URI of the subject term.
The classification code used for the subject term in the subject scheme.
definition_ko: 주제 체계 내에서 사용된 분류 코드.

definition: The institution or person responsible for collecting, managing, distributing, or otherwise contributing to the development of the resource.
definition_ko: 자원 수집·관리·배포·기여를 담당하는 기관 또는 사람.

definition: The type of contributor of the resource. Allowed values include: ContactPerson, DataCollector, DataCurator, etc.
notes: DataCite sub-property #7.1. TTA-0976 ContributorType 통제어가 직접 인용

definition: The full name of the contributor.
Different dates relevant to the work.
The type of date. Allowed values: Accepted, Available, Copyrighted, Collected, Created, Issued, Submitted, Updated, Valid, Withdrawn, Other.
notes: DataCite sub-property #8.1. TTA-0976 DateType 통제어 (CollectionDateType/DatasetDateType/FileDateType) 모두 이 어휘에서 부분 인용

definition: Specific information about the date if appropriate.
The primary language of the resource.
notes: DataCite Schema 4.5 Optional property #9. IETF BCP 47 권장

definition: A description of the resource.
notes: DataCite Schema 4.5 Mandatory property #10. Free-form text describing the resource

definition: The general type of a resource. Allowed values include: Audiovisual, Award, Book, Collection, Dataset, Image, Model, Service, Software, Sound, Text, etc.
notes: DataCite sub-attribute #10.a. ResourceTypeGeneral controlled vocabulary (DCMI Type 호환)

definition: An identifier or identifiers other than the primary Identifier applied to the resource being registered.
The type of the AlternateIdentifier.
Identifiers of related resources.
The type of the RelatedIdentifier.
notes: DataCite sub-property #12.1. **TTA-0976 IdentifierType 통제어가 이 어휘에서 직접 인용 (ARK/DOI/ISBN/etc.)**

definition: Description of the relationship of the resource being registered (A) and the related resource (B). Allowed values include  and others.
definition_ko: 두 자원 간 관계 유형 (IsCitedBy/Cites/IsPartOf/HasPart/IsDerivedFrom 등 ~30개 enum).

definition: Size (e.g. bytes pages inches etc.) or duration (extent) e.g. hours minutes days etc. of a resource.
definition_ko: 자원의 크기 (바이트·페이지·인치 등) 또는 지속시간 (시간·분·일 등).

definition: Technical format of the resource.
The version number of the resource.
notes: DataCite Schema 4.5 Optional property #15. SemVer 권장

definition: Any rights information for this resource.
The URI of the license.
A short standardized version of the license name.
All additional information that does not fit in any of the other categories.
definition_ko: 다른 카테고리에 맞지 않는 모든 추가 정보.
equivalent_terms: dcterms:description, schema:description, tta0976:Collection_Description, tta0976:Dataset_Description, tta0976:File_Description, tta0976:Repository_Description

definition: The type of the description. Allowed values: Abstract, Methods, SeriesInformation, TableOfContents, TechnicalInfo, Other.
Spatial region or named place where the data was gathered or about which the data is focused.
definition_ko: 데이터 수집 공간 또는 데이터의 초점이 되는 명명된 장소.

definition: Description of a geographic location.
A point location in space.
The spatial limits of a place.
Information about financial support (funding) for the resource being registered.
Name of the funding provider.
Uniquely identifies a funding entity according to various funder identifier schemes (e.g. Crossref Funder ID).
definition_ko: 자금 제공 기관의 식별자 (예: Crossref Funder ID).

definition: The code assigned by the funder to a sponsored award (grant).
definition_ko: 자금 제공자가 후원 award (보조금)에 부여한 코드.

definition: The human readable title of the award (grant).
Information about a resource related to the one being registered.
definition_ko: 등록되는 자원과 관련된 다른 자원에 대한 정보.
notes: DataCite Schema 4.5 Optional property #20 (added in v4.4)

definition: The container element for a research data repository.
notes: re3data Schema 3.1 root element. TTA-0976이 Repository 클래스 출처로 사용

definition: The full name of the repository.
notes: re3data property ID 4. TTA-0976 RepositoryName(R4) 출처

definition: An additional name for the repository (e.g. translation acronym).
URL of the repository service.
notes: re3data property ID 4 URL field. TTA-0976 RepositoryUrl(R2) 출처

definition: Identifier of the repository registered in registries.
notes: re3data property ID 5. TTA-0976 Repository Identifier(R3) 출처

definition: Type of the repository identifier.
A short description of the repository.
notes: re3data property ID 6. TTA-0976 Repository Description(R18) 출처

definition: Contact information of the repository.
notes: re3data property ID 7. TTA-0976 RepositoryContact(R21) 출처

definition: Type of the repository (disciplinary/governmental/institutional/multidisciplinary/project-related/other).
notes: re3data property ID 10. TTA-0976 Repository Type(R5) 출처

definition: Language of the user interface (ISO 639-3).
notes: re3data property ID 12. TTA-0976 RepositoryLanguage(R6) 출처

definition: Subject area of the repository.
notes: re3data property ID 13. TTA-0976 Subject(R7) 출처

definition: Subject classification scheme used.
notes: re3data property ID 13. TTA-0976 SubjectScheme(R7.1) 출처. DFG 권장

definition: Subject classification code.
Subject classification name.
Free keywords describing the repository.
Institution that operates or supports the repository.

notes: re3data property ID 18.1. TTA-0976 InstitutionName(R8) 출처

definition: Type of institution (commercial/non-profit).
Country where the institution is located (ISO 3166-1 alpha-3).
notes: re3data property ID 18.3. TTA-0976 InstitutionCountry(R9) 출처. [OVERRIDE 적용: TTA에서는 alpha-2로 변경]

definition: Responsibility of the institution (general/funding/main/sponsoring/technical/other).
notes: re3data property ID 18.4. TTA-0976 ResponsibilityType(R19) 출처

definition: Contact information of the institution.
notes: re3data property ID 18.10. TTA-0976 InstitutionContact(R20) 출처

definition: Additional name of the institution.
URL of the institution.
Identifier of the institution (e.g. ROR ID).
Start date of the repository service.
End date of the repository service (if discontinued).
Size of the repository (number of items or bytes).
Access type of the database (open/restricted/closed).
notes: re3data property ID 20.1. TTA-0976 DatabaseAccessType(R10) 출처

definition: Database access restrictions.
Name of the database license.
URL of the database license document.
Access type for data (open/restricted/closed/embargoed).
notes: re3data property ID 22.1. TTA-0976 DataAccessType(R11) + Collection/Dataset/File AccessType 모두 출처

definition: Data access restrictions (feeRequired/registration/institutional membership/non-registration/free/other).
notes: re3data property ID 22.2. TTA-0976 Collection/Dataset/File AccessRestriction 모두 출처

notes: re3data property ID 23.2. TTA-0976 DataLicenseUrl(R13) 출처

definition: Data upload type (open/restricted/closed).

definition: Data upload restrictions.
Licensing model for uploaded data.
Versioning support (yes/no/unknown).
notes: re3data property ID 27. TTA-0976 Versioning(R15) 출처

definition: API endpoint(s) for accessing repository programmatically.
Type of API (OAI-PMH/REST/SPARQL/etc.).
Persistent identifier systems used (DOI/Handle/ARK/etc.).
URL of citation guidelines.
Author identifier system used (e.g. ORCID).
Support for enhanced publication / interlinking with publications (yes/no/unknown).
notes: re3data property ID 34. TTA-0976 EnhancedPublication(R16) 출처

definition: Quality management practice (yes/no/unknown).
notes: re3data property ID 35. TTA-0976 QualityManagement(R17) 출처. Decision-Q4: yes일 때 DQV 활성

definition: Quality/trust certificates (e.g. CoreTrustSeal/WDS).
Names of metadata standards used.
URLs of metadata standards used.
Names of repository policies.

Type of content stored (Standard office documents/Audiovisual data/Images/Software applications/etc.).

Data encoded in a defined structure.
notes: DCMI Type Vocabulary. equivalentClass with dcat:Dataset, schema:Dataset

definition: A non-persistent time-based occurrence.
A visual representation other than text.
notes: DCMI Type Vocabulary. Includes both StillImage and MovingImage as subtypes

definition: A resource requiring interaction from the user to be understood, executed, or experienced.
definition_ko: 이해·실행·경험을 위해 사용자 상호작용이 필요한 자원.

definition: A series of visual representations imparting an impression of motion when shown in succession.
definition_ko: 연속적으로 표시될 때 움직임의 인상을 주는 일련의 시각적 표현.
notes: DCMI Type Vocabulary. Sub-class of dctype:Image

definition: An inanimate, three-dimensional object or substance.
A system that provides one or more functions.
A computer program in source or compiled form.
definition_ko: 소스 또는 컴파일된 형태의 컴퓨터 프로그램.

definition: A resource primarily intended to be heard.
A static visual representation.
notes: DCMI Type Vocabulary. Sub-class of dctype:Image

definition: A resource consisting primarily of words for reading.
definition_ko: 주로 읽기를 위한 단어로 구성된 자원.

definition: ISO 639-1 specifies two-letter alphabetic codes (alpha-2) representing the names of languages. Examples: en (English), ko (Korean), de (German), fr (French).
definition_ko: 언어 이름을 나타내는 2자리 알파벳 코드. 예: en (영어), ko (한국어), de (독일어), fr (프랑스어).
notes: 표준 자체에 대한 참조 카드. 코드값은 표준의 명세를 직접 참조. 인벤토리에 코드값 개별 추출하지 않음. HTML lang 속성 표준

definition: ISO 639-2 specifies three-letter alphabetic codes (alpha-3) representing the names of languages. Examples: eng (English), kor (Korean), deu (German), fra (French).
definition_ko: 언어 이름을 나타내는 3자리 알파벳 코드. 예: eng (영어), kor (한국어), deu (독일어), fra (프랑스어).
notes: 표준 자체에 대한 참조 카드. ISO 639-2/B (Bibliographic) 와 ISO 639-2/T (Terminology) 변형 존재

definition: ISO 639-3 provides comprehensive coverage of all known languages with three-letter codes (alpha-3). Examples: kor (Korean), eng (English).
definition_ko: 모든 알려진 언어에 대한 포괄적 3자리 코드. ISO 639-2를 확장. 예: kor, eng.
notes: TTA-0976 RepositoryLanguage(R6)와 Language 통제어가 직접 인용

definition: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 specifies two-letter country codes representing names of countries and dependent territories. Examples: KR (Korea), US (United States), DE (Germany), JP (Japan).
definition_ko: 국가·종속 영토 이름을 나타내는 2자리 코드. 예: KR (대한민국), US (미국), DE (독일), JP (일본).
notes: TTA-0976 InstitutionCountry(R9)에 [OVERRIDE] 적용으로 본 표준 사용 (decision: 2026-05-04). DCAT v3·HTML lang·웹 표준 호환

definition: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 specifies three-letter country codes. Examples: KOR (Korea), USA (United States), DEU (Germany), JPN (Japan).
definition_ko: 국가의 3자리 코드. 예: KOR (대한민국), USA (미국), DEU (독일), JPN (일본).
notes: TTA-0976 표준 원문에서 권장하는 형식 (예: KOR). 본 인벤토리는 [OVERRIDE]로 alpha-2(INV-6304)를 적용. 변환 함수 필요 (KOR ↔ KR)

definition: ISO 8601 specifies an internationally accepted way to represent dates and times. Format examples: YYYY-MM-DD (date), YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss (datetime), YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssTZD (with timezone). W3CDTF subset is widely used.
definition_ko: 날짜·시간의 국제 표준 표현 방식. 예: YYYY-MM-DD (날짜), YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss (날짜시간), YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssTZD (시간대 포함). W3CDTF 부분집합 널리 사용
notes: TTA-0976의 모든 Date/Coverage/PublicationYear 필드의 값 형식 표준. W3CDTF=W3C Date and Time Format은 ISO 8601의 부분집합
